name: Fried Soft-Shell Crab
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the cleaned crabs well.
2. Mix the egg, milk, salt, and pepper; soak the crabs in the mixture.
3. Coat the crabs with flour, then deep-fry in hot oil until brown.
4. Drain on paper towels; garnish with lemon slices and sprinkle with minced parsley.
NOTE: Wonderful to serve at a picnic or backyard supper.
